features.featureTitle: Update the DueReminders frontend component to display the due date (or time remaining) alongside each reminder's interval badge. For each due reminder item, show a human-readable label indicating when it is due (e.g., 'Due today', 'Due in 2 days', 'Overdue by 1 day'). Also update the interval badge labels to match the new set: '1-day', '3-day', '7-day', '1-month', '3-month'.

Update the TopicManager component and any other frontend section that lists or references reminder intervals to display all five intervals (1-day, 3-day, 7-day, 1-month, 3-month) with their scheduled due dates visible. If the topic list shows upcoming reminder dates per topic, ensure all five interval entries are rendered with a formatted date string.
